news.t: Small-cap ETFs went on a wild ride. Can they regain momentum after Trump takes office?
Infrastructure Capital Advisors Adds to Its Lineup of Innovative Income-Generating Solutions with the Launch of the Infrastructure Capital Bond Income ETF (BNDS)

overview.description: The Infrastructure Capital Bond Income ETF (BNDS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund aims to maximize current income and capital appreciation by actively investing in fixed-income securities, predominantly corporate bonds. Securities may be of any credit quality and maturity from around the globe BNDS was launched on Jan 15, 2025 and is issued by InfraCap.

data.title: Infrastructure Capital Declares Monthly Dividends
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Infrastructure Capital is declaring monthly dividends for three of its Exchange Traded Funds ("ETFs"), tickers BNDS, SCAP and ICAP.

data.title: Small-cap ETFs went on a wild ride. Can they regain momentum after Trump takes office?
data.text: Small-cap ETFs have been on a roller-coaster ride in the first two weeks of the new year.

data.title: Infrastructure Capital Advisors Adds to Its Lineup of Innovative Income-Generating Solutions with the Launch of the Infrastructure Capital Bond Income ETF (BNDS)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Infrastructure Capital launches BNDS, an active ETF targeting attractive income, invests across fixed income securities, with focus on corporate bonds.
